hypothesis: If EfficientNet-B0 is sequentially pretrained on ImageNet and additive-free NCM SEM images and then fine-tuned with class rebalancing on scarce additive-induced SEM data, then its class-wise accuracy and F1 for jointly classifying NCM composition and aging state will significantly exceed models trained only on the target data or without fine-tuning because transferable microstructural features (e.g., cracking and surface boundaries) generalize across domains.
